problem id: 37a00064
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(6) XOR SHR(7)) AND ROT(7)

examples:
  11101101 -> 01000000
  00011101 -> 00000000
  10010000 -> 00000000
  11110010 -> 00000001
  01001000 -> 00000000
  00111100 -> 00000000
  10001001 -> 01000000
  01001110 -> 00000000
  01010011 -> 10000000

query: 11001110
predicted answer: 00000001
